headline: SolarEdge Technologies' Q1 Loss Wider Than Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
summary: SEDG posts wider-than-expected Q1 loss as revenues jump 41% y/y and beat estimates, signaling improving operations despite ongoing losses.

headline: First Solar Inc (NASDAQ:FSLR): A Value Investing Star with a Strong Margin of Safety
summary: First Solar (FSLR) offers a compelling value play with a low P/E of 14.17, strong profitability, and minimal debt. This deep dive reveals a cheap stock with a solid margin of safety for value investors.
